prompt:
Goal: Create a soft Japanese storybook-style good-luck charm poster themed around sheep magic and bedtime gratitude.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 illustration, warm ivory parchment background with subtle watercolor texture, faint circular astrological orbit lines, gold speckles, and dreamy celestial accents.

Layout: Place the character on the left third, facing forward and reaching one hand toward the viewer with an index finger pointing outward. Keep the right two-thirds mostly open for elegant Japanese typography. Center the title in the upper-right area, a thin gold divider line with a small star beneath it, then two centered message lines below. Add a tiny sheep icon near the lower center under the message.

Subject details: Illustrate exactly 1 young girl in a gentle watercolor anime picture-book style. She has wavy light brown shoulder-length hair, a fluffy white sheep hood with two floppy ears, and a pale sage-green long-sleeve dress with small white daisy prints and soft ruffles. Her face is intentionally hidden by a plain skin-toned square with no facial features. She carries exactly 1 woven wicker basket in her other hand, decorated with exactly 1 cute sheep face ornament and a bit of white wool trim. Behind her on the far left is exactly 1 large gold crescent moon.

Text content: Use Japanese calligraphy-inspired typography. Main title: ひつじのおまじない followed by exactly 1 pink faceted heart emoji/gem on the right. Message line 1: 今日ラッキーだった事を. Message line 2: ひとつ思い出してから寝よう. Highlight the word 「ラッキー」 in soft pink while the rest of the message is dark warm brown.

Decorative elements: Include exactly 1 main gold crescent moon, exactly 1 pink heart gem, exactly 1 small gold sheep icon under the text, exactly 1 thin horizontal divider line with a central star, and numerous tiny gold stars, dots, and constellation-like arcs distributed lightly across the background. Add soft white daisies and pale green foliage in the lower-left and lower-right corners without overpowering the text.

Visual style: Delicate watercolor, soft beige and gold palette, airy magical bedtime mood, Japanese kawaii fairy-tale atmosphere, gentle paper grain, low contrast, elegant and calming.

Constraints: Keep all typography crisp and readable, preserve the wide poster composition, avoid modern UI elements, avoid photorealism, no watermark, no extra characters, no extra main text.
